D1 Optics L4 Analyze Reference

Sellmeier Dispersion Through a Prism

fan a Sellmeier-modelled glass and see how flint disperses farther than crown

The Sellmeier equation fits a glass's refractive index across the visible band from three resonance terms. Different glasses give very different spreads.

Pick a glass and adjust apex α and entry angle. Each visible wavelength refracts at its own Sellmeier index — the gold readout reports the angular spread between red and violet.
